title: Consistent Netherite Helmet
description: Changes the texture and model of the netherite helmet to be consistent with the other helmets in the game!
body:
This resource pack changes the texture and model of the netherite helmet to be consistent with the other helmets in the game!

[Please report any bugs to me on discord](https://discord.com/users/761775444516929538)

Netherite Helmet Texture

![Netherite Helmet Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e19da06674266e34ee48d98bf4dde3941fc4df8d_0.webp)

Netherite Helmet Model

![Netherite Helmet Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f242df53a8548c98117b7732ccbd172549f613a6.jpeg)

Before VS After Comparison

![Before VS After Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bec2241cb545bba7b115bc091773eadc803af13.jpeg)!

Made by MrNoodleStroodle
